# flip

> CLI and plain-file format for reporter's notebooks — git-friendly research corpora (sources with custody and grading, claims with verification, work/session logs) maintained by humans and agents, with no service required to read them.

## Docs

- [README.md](README.md): Project overview, design commitments, install, and quickstart.
- [SPEC.md](SPEC.md): The notebook format — directory layout, manifest, source ledger and provenance, claim ledger, logs, profiles, CLI, and integration contract.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): How agents should use flip — the five-minute tour, the conventions that must be honored, and task recipes.
- [docs/quickstart.md](docs/quickstart.md): Human-facing walkthrough — install, create a notebook, the capture→grade→claim→verify loop, fetcher configuration, profiles.
- [docs/internals.md](docs/internals.md): Module map and code contracts for the reference implementation (normative for contributors).

## Optional

- [docs/wiki-alignment.md](docs/wiki-alignment.md): Design notes for `flip export okf` — projecting a notebook as an OKF v0.1 knowledge bundle.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute; tests and style expectations.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Release history.
